channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping from neighbour, 7th April
item.description:
Fly tipping from neighbours. Repeat occurrence.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Digby Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped wood / building rubbish, 7th April
item.description:
Dumped builders rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Reveley Square, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large number of flytipped ive and rose branches, 7th April
item.description:
Found a very large number of flytipped branches,and some heavy root boles dumped in the wild flower bed at the entrance to Havelock Rec from Homesdale Road. As I know what plants are where in that bed, I got some passers by to help me move them to the side of the path - please pick them up soon before the Beacon Academy boys redistribute them again

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 107, Homesdale Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Brick wall fallen down, 7th April
item.description:
Large part of brick wall at entrance of close has fallen down. Very dangerous and unstable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Broom Avenue, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wide & deep pothole in the middle of the road, 7th April
item.description:
Another example of a pothole after this winter’s rains. To be fair the whole surface of Whitworth Street is pockmarked by pothole after pothole after pothole. It would be nice if they were sorted either in one go or if the whols road surface is replaced.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whitworth Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Brown sofa on pavement., 7th April
item.description:
Someone has dumped a brown sofa on the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Balaclava Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on pavement, 7th April
item.description:
Rubbish on pavement. Encouraging rats in nearby buildings

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Lewisham Way, New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poos on the pavement, 7th April
item.description:
Dog poo and cat / fox poo either side of the tree.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Buckingham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Church House Gardens, Heron's Lake (duck pond), 7th April
item.description:
Supermarket Trolley has found its way into the pond. It's missing it's nice cozy shop.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tetty Way, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 7th April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped on both junctions of findon Road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sutherland Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repeated fly tipping, 7th April
item.description:
Predictably there’s another Easter special massive fly tip in the usual place by the usual people. Partly because they don’t care nor have enough bin capacity for the amount of people there. And partly because no proper waste facility has been provided. Thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Talbot Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 7th April
item.description:
Rubbish and furniture behind properties and end of pathways

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22A,22B,22C,22D, Sholden Gardens, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glengall road, 7th April
item.description:
Between kilburn high road and charteris road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near traveller sight, 7th April
item.description:
I reported last week report says rectified but still there

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hockenden Lane, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned maintenance truck, 7th April
item.description:
A possibly stolen maintenance truck has been abandoned for 5 days in a 1 hour parking day. Customers cannot park to use the local shops.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Homesdale Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, 7th April
item.description:
Bins have not been collected and are now overflowing

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rectory Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike has been locked to post for months, 7th April
item.description:
This bike was locked to a lamp post for 5/6 months. It is not being used and has not moved at all. It regularly falls down and gets in the way of the footpath. It is locked to the post outside 30 Westcott.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westcott Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped BMW no mot, 7th April
item.description:
Dumped BMW no mot

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Brackley Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bush, 7th April
item.description:
They said last year they were removing it then said they wasnt. Then said it was fine but today a woman walked round fast and had to move quickly not to walk in to me! Its a yearly problem when its over grown. Why does it keep changing on if it will be cut back/removed. Others report its a dust bin every year too

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southlands Grove, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blue Southwark bags full of waste dumped on East Dulwich Grove, 7th April
item.description:
Someone dumped these bags outside 1 Deventer Crescent - my house - at some point over the weekend and the foxes have got at them. They contain cat litter, nappies and other waste, and they smell horrendous. Because they are in marked Southwark Council bags my first assumption was that this was a council project but neighbours say it was a private citizen flytipping.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Deventer Crescent, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
